title: Scope-check T-Deck shared SPI chip selects
description: Run a physical shared-SPI chip-select validation on LilyGO T-Deck. With LoRa, display, and SD nodes enabled in controlled overlays, capture GPIO9/12/39 with a logic analyzer or scope and prove each non-target CS remains inactive during unrelated LoRa/display/SD transfers. Acceptance: capture setup, firmware build, transfer sequence, and waveforms/logs are recorded; any CS contention or ESP32-S3 GPIO ownership issue creates a corrective board/driver Bead.
notes: Blocked for this no-hardware execution loop (2026-07-01): acceptance requires physical hardware, real RF/BLE capture, logic-analyzer/scope evidence, board flashing, or partner-provided physical logs. No local physical radios/boards/phones/captures are available. Leave blocked until hardware/evidence is available; software-only prerequisites should be tracked in separate dependent Beads.
